title: ATID-433 A Mourning Wife Wears Musty Pantyhose Mizuki Yayoi
description: The third anniversary of my father-in-law. Reimi visits her husband's parents' house, which now has only a brother-in-law, as a couple. His brother-in-law did not get a regular job, and he was constantly quarreling with his younger brother, Reimi's husband, and was accused of being a poor brother to his relatives. Meanwhile, her husband suddenly returned to Tokyo due to work trouble, and Reimi who was left behind becomes an outlet for her brother-in-law's inferiority complex.
